summary: Solid recording of the Oakland Coliseum Mardi Gras run despite a notoriously difficult venue.
review: The single review praises the engineers for overcoming the acoustic challenges of the Oakland Coliseum and delivering a nicely captured performance of the Mardi Gras series. While no specific musical moments are called out, the 4‑star rating indicates an overall positive impression of both the show and its sound.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 ★) which lauds the recording quality but gives no detail on musical performance; rating reflects strong technical capture with neutral show assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Oakland Coliseum is a tough venue, yet the engineers made good mic/placement choices and captured the Mardi Gras run nicely.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mardi Gras run noted as well‑captured; no specific comments on pacing or song order.
